Properties.Description: Administrators with inventory and review-order privileges
AWS CDK resource provider framework - onEvent (OrderProcessingFraudDetectionStack/DemoUsersProvider)

Code.ZipFile:
import json
import os
import time
from decimal import Decimal

import boto3

ddb = boto3.resource("dynamodb")


def handler(event, context):
    props = event["ResourceProperties"]
    table_name = props["TableName"]
    products_json = props["ProductsJson"]
    physical_id = f"seed-products-{table_name}"

    if event["RequestType"] == "Delete":
        return {"PhysicalResourceId": physical_id}

    table = ddb.Table(table_name)
    products = json.loads(products_json)
    now = int(time.time() * 1000)
    for p in products:
        item = {
            "sku": p["sku"],
            "name": p["name"],
            "description": p["description"],
            "category": p["category"],
            "price": Decimal(str(p["price"])),
            "currency": p.get("currency", "USD"),
            "stock": int(p["stock"]),
            "imageUrl": p["imageUrl"],
            "active": True,
            "createdAt": now,
            "updatedAt": now,
        }
        table.put_item(Item=item)

    return {"PhysicalResourceId": physical_id}
